mapper.sql: a.id ,a.event_category ,GET_CODE_NAME('evt_cate', a.event_category) AS eventCategoryNm ,a.event_mng_sp ,a.title ,a.event_thumbnail ,a.event_image ,a.content ,a.manager ,a.start_date AS startDate ,a.end_date AS endDate ,DATE_FORMAT(a.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS stringStartDate ,DATE_FORMAT(a.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS stringEndDate ,IFNULL(a.event_notice_sp,'C') event_notice_sp ,a.event_notice_image ,a.event_notice_content ,a.use_yn ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id

if.test: searchKeywordType != null and !searchKeywordType.equals('') and searchKeywordType.equals('ALL') and searchKeyword != null and !searchKeyword.equals('')

where.if: AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR b.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

if.test: searchKeywordType != null and !searchKeywordType.equals('') and searchKeywordType.equals('TIT') and searchKeyword != null and !searchKeyword.equals('')
searchKeywordType != null and !searchKeywordType.equals('') and searchKeywordType.equals('CREATER') and searchKeyword != null and !searchKeyword.equals('')
searchUseYn != null and searchUseYn != '' and searchUseYn !='ALL'

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_evt_event a LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user b ON a.create_id = b.id

SELECT
FROM tb_evt_event a LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user b ON a.create_id = b.id WHERE a.id = #{searchId}
